name: O-1 seed corpus: every postmortem entry is tagged bootstrap_seed: true per the §13 provenance tag
command: n=0; m=0; for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/postmortems"/*.jsonl; do n=$((n+1)); grep -q '"bootstrap_seed":true' "$f" && m=$((m+1)); done; [ "$n" -gt 0 ] && [ "$n" -eq "$m" ] && echo "tagged=$m/$n" 1>&2
